transcript: 小企鹅只能利用速度和敏捷以自私与死神擦肩而过虎精穷追不舍势在必得小企鹅的体力终将耗尽它能得到幸运女神的眷顾最终金口逃生吗本期节目让我们走进南极洲体验惊心动魄的自然传奇大约两亿年前天地混沌未开地球地貌与今天截然不同那时候地球只有一片超级大陆世人称其为盘古大陆在时间的长河中盘古大陆开始分裂各个大陆板块向四周飘移最终形成了现在的七大洲被冰雪覆盖的南极洲在大约两百年前才被人类首次发现。这里是全球自然环境最恶劣的地方,几乎看不到任何生命的迹象。动物们只能依赖四周的海洋为生,但即便是海洋也会冻结。只有一种哺乳动物能在这片极难之地生存它就是韦德尔海豹这头母海豹不断用牙齿摩擦冰层的边缘以此来保证呼吸孔的通畅在广袤无垠的海滨上它们能躲避开阔海域的捕食者一头母海豹刚刚当了妈妈海豹幼崽从温暖的子宫落到冰面上它刚出生就经历了最剧烈的温差变化出生后的前十天它还不会游泳只能困在海滨上无法入水这对它来说是非常危险的即使在春季气温也在零下40摄氏度左右徘徊强劲的暴风雪可能会延续数天海豹妈妈用庞大的身躯为幼崽遮风挡雪疾风裹挟着雪力打在身上琵琶作响海豹母子几乎成了雪球三天过去了暴风雪依旧疯狂肆虐海豹妈妈已经到了承受的极限此刻她面临着最艰难的抉择是留在冰面上守护幼崽还是回到水中寻求庇护如果留下来这对母子很可能都会冻死最终海豹妈妈选择了后者孤独无一的幼崽想要活下来只能寄希望于暴风雪尽快停止她弱小的身体逐渐消失在茫茫雪海中第二天金色的太阳爬上地平线很多幼崽却再也等不到温暖的阳光海豹妈妈浮出水面急切地呼唤孩子她的呼唤得到了回应孩子还活着母子俩节后重逢场面温馨幼崽跟着妈妈一起下水就再也不用担心暴风雪了水下温度在零度左右总比趴在冰面上暖和得多她的生存几率也将大大提高南极洲远离极点的大陆边缘地带散布着许多不会接冰的岛屿南乔治亚岛栖息着大约50万只王企鹅王企鹅与地企鹅区别明显它们在体型、颜色和分布范围上有所不同春季王�王企鹅父母经常要外出觅食,只有企鹅宝宝独自留在岛上。父母希望它们留在原地等待,但这只企鹅宝宝似乎游行正浓。周围都是有待探索的新鲜事物,比如这个小毛球就是相当有趣的玩具。企鹅宝宝嫌弃小毛球迎风玩耍,可能是太好玩了,小伙伴们也想试试,好玩的东西太多了,企鹅宝宝好奇心正盛,比如这头象海豹,肉肉的一大坨看起来软萌无害,但其实它的脾气挺暴躁,身上的雷雷伤痕就是证据他们是世界上体型最大的海豹因其鼻子高高隆起形似橡皮而得名这片海滩异常拥挤要想在海滩占据一席之地就必须经历连番血战这头雄性象海豹首领会与多达六十头雌性进行交配身上的斑斑血迹是他贪图美色付出的相应代价两个月来他经历了大大小小无数次战斗因为无暇进食再加上纵欲过度他的体重正以每天十公斤的速度锐减此刻他早已疲惫不堪其他雄性在海滩附近徘徊伺机而动眼下正是夺取交配权的最佳时机挑战者蠕动着肥瘦的身体向着首领直奔而去首领瞪大了眼睛张开大嘴低声怒吼箭在弦上不得不发双方高高耸立挺直身体互相撕咬撞击谢谢大家张开大嘴低声怒吼箭在弦上不得不发双方高高耸立挺直身体互相撕咬撞击雄性成年后体重可达四吨巨大的撞击声响彻海滩尽管他们长有坚硬厚实的皮肤但也会在猛烈的进攻下伤痕累累他们的身上几乎是新伤落旧伤交战异常激烈直到挑衅者败退海滩才重新归于宁静南极地区的海洋温度正在上升冰川消融岁月飞溅某些地区海滨的消融速度每十年就会翻一番南极洲是地球上最寒冷的地区全球气候变暖对这里产生了深远的影响一些鸟类的生存也面临着严峻的威胁这只杏天翁鸟宝宝刚刚满月父母轮流为它遮挡凛冽的寒风这是它们两年来孕育的唯一一只雏鸟鸟会的轻轻触碰可以增强彼此间的情感纽带但是这样的温情时刻不会一直持续雏鸟渐渐长大它的胃口也逐渐增加父母不得不相继外出 There's a lot of different tourist trips you can do in the country, but not all of them take you out into the middle of a beautiful wilderness like the Grand Canyon. It's just cool to watch somebody come down here and have an experience that could possibly change their life. This is one of the best places in the world, and why not? It's an adventure every single day. I mean, it was just one wow moment after another. We're not really campers or necessarily crazy outdoorsmen, but I just wanted to have a different kind of vacation. Everything is is pretty much taken care of for you and it's pretty easy I mean it's by no means roughing it roughing it so like we've been taken care of now just letting us enjoy the park you know different than the previous two trips I've done in the Grand Canyon just because it's always a different hike. It's always different guides and different people on the boats that you're meeting and found a new favorite hike this time, which was awesome. And also just the rapids are different every time you run them, so it's different every time and it's awesome every time. I think the side hikes are pretty special and kind of make a trip because they're things you don't see from the rim or you can't get to without going down the river. This is absolutely spectacular. The colors are so beautiful. I think that's more than anything. I didn't expect that it would look like this. It's absolutely clear that we are in the hands of accomplished professionals who know exactly Thanks for watching! that it would look like this it's absolutely clear that we are in the hands of accomplished professionals who know exactly what this river is about how their equipment works and how to make it work comfortably for us this is about the easiest camping you can do all the gears is packed for you when you show up the crew shows you how to set up up all the cots and the tents. And there's beautiful beaches everywhere we camp on and nice spots. My favorite part is sleeping under the stars. That's it. It's the best thing. The rafting's a blast, but I think we really enjoyed the camaraderie of the campsites and eating the good food that's cooked here. Yeah, food's amazing. Being able to socialize and meet bunch of people from all over the place so we've really become one big group you know hanging out at camp at night and doing everything playing games and all that sort of stuff together it's been really fun I love the rapids on the morning of Day two, was in the front with Wayne and we just had it was a one we went through the roaring 20s it was just fabulous the rapids are a thrill they're exciting you get a little anxious before you go down it's all it's all fun and my mom could do it my little cousin could do it it's awesome it's so much fun you're just an average person and you want to see the rest of the Grand Canyon this is the only way to do it and quite frankly we've seen some things that you cannot see any other way坦白说,我们看到了一些你无法看到的其他方式。鸟妈妈温柔地抚慰孩子她遥望着海平面内心充满了不舍可她别无选择最终振翅飞走了这是雏鸟第一次独自面对这个世界南极洲是风暴最多风力最强的大陆近年来因为气候越来越极端暴风雨变得更加频繁威力更加强悍风速甚至能达到每小时110公里鸟宝宝被吹得左摇右晃狂风肆虐过后鸟巢空空如也这只鸟宝宝幸免于难可它身上沾满了污泥连翻身的力气都没有了在低温下存活又是一大挑战一旦离开鸟巢它只能勉强存活几个小时满地的绒毛无言地控诉着环境的残酷一些鸟宝宝再也等不到父母回家了父子亲情如此强烈这位鸟爸爸久久不肯离去他多么希望能唤醒自己的孩子越来越多的信天翁父母返回栖息地这只鸟妈妈急切地寻找着孩子鸟巢里空空如也

父母不得不相继外出 There's a lot of different tourist trips you can do in the country, but not all of them take you out into the middle of a beautiful wilderness like the Grand Canyon. It's just cool to watch somebody come down here and have an experience that could possibly change their life. This is one of the best places in the world, and why not? It's an adventure every single day. I mean, it was just one wow moment after another. We're not really campers or necessarily crazy outdoorsmen, but I just wanted to have a different kind of vacation. Everything is is pretty much taken care of for you and it's pretty easy I mean it's by no means roughing it roughing it so like we've been taken care of now just letting us enjoy the park you know different than the previous two trips I've done in the Grand Canyon just because it's always a different hike.

It's always different guides and different people on the boats that you're meeting and found a new favorite hike this time, which was awesome. And also just the rapids are different every time you run them, so it's different every time and it's awesome every time. I think the side hikes are pretty special and kind of make a trip because
they're things
you don't see from the rim or you can't get to without going down the river.
This is absolutely spectacular.
The colors are so beautiful.
I think that's more than anything.
I didn't expect that it would look like this.

And there's beautiful beaches everywhere we camp on and nice spots. My favorite part is sleeping under the stars. That's it. It's the best thing. The rafting's a blast, but I think we really enjoyed the camaraderie of the campsites and eating the good food that's cooked here. Yeah, food's amazing. Being able to socialize and meet bunch of people from all over the place so we've really become one big group you know hanging out at camp at night and doing everything playing games and all that sort of stuff together it's been really fun I love the rapids on the morning of Day two, was in the front with Wayne and we just had it was a one we went through the roaring 20s it was just fabulous the rapids are a thrill they're exciting you get a little anxious before you go down it's all it's all fun and my mom could do it my little cousin could do it it's awesome it's so much fun
you're just an average person and you want to see the rest of the Grand Canyon
this is the only way to do it and quite frankly we've seen some things that you
